SQL Query: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS total_amount FROM (SELECT total_amount AS total_amount FROM sample_table WHERE year = "2024" AND category = "Home & Kitchen" AND quantity_sold = "6" UNION ALL SELECT total_amount AS total_amount FROM sample_table WHERE year = "2025" AND category = "Sports" AND quantity_sold = "4" UNION ALL SELECT total_amount AS total_amount FROM sample_table WHERE year = "2025" AND category = "Toys" AND quantity_sold = "7");

Question: What is the combined sum of prices for single-purchase clothing items from the year 2023, together with sports items bought in quantities of three and six during that same year, plus toys that were acquired in sets of three in 2023?
